[And let them say whatever they say until the time when they behold that [doom] of which they were forewarned-whether it be suffering [in this world] or [at the coming of] the Last Hour -: for then they will understand which [of the two kinds of man] was worse in station and weaker in resources
t.yusuf-ali: Say: "If any men go astray, (Allah) Most Gracious extends (the rope) to them, until, when they see the warning of Allah (being fulfilled) - either in punishment or in (the approach of) the Hour,- they will at length realise who is worst in position, and (who) weakest in forces
t.pickthall: Say: As for him who is in error, the Beneficent will verily prolong his span of life until, when they behold that which they were promised, whether it be punishment (in the world), or the Hour (of doom), they will know who is worse in position and who is weaker as an army
t.arberry: Say: 'Whosoever is in error, let the All-merciful prolong his term for him! Till, when they see that they were threatened, whether the chastisement, or the Hour, then they shall surely know who is worse in place, and who is weaker in hosts
t.hilali-khan: Say (O Muhammad SAW) whoever is in error, the Most Beneficent (Allah) will extend (the rope) to him, until, when they see that which they were promised, either the torment or the Hour, they will come to know who is worst in position, and who is weaker in forces. [This is the answer for the Verse No]
t.itani: Say, “Whoever is in error, the Most Merciful will lead him on.” Until, when they see what they were promised—either the punishment, or the Hour. Then they will know who was in worse position and weaker in forces.
t.mubarakpuri: Say: whoever is in error, the Most Gracious will extend [circumstances] for him, until, when they see that which they were promised, either the torment or the Hour, they will come to know who is worst in position, and who is weaker in forces.
t.qarib: Say, "As for him who is lost, let the Merciful-to-all lengthen the span of his days until they see what they were promised, punishment either [in this world] or at the Hour [of Judgment]. Then they will clearly see who is worse in possessions and who has the weaker forces
t.wahiduddin: Say, "The Gracious One grants respite for a time to those who are in error until, when they are confronted with what they are promised, either in punishment [in the world] or in [the approach of] the Hour, they will realize who is worse in respect of position and who is weaker in resources
t.shakir: Say: As for him who remains in error, the Beneficent Allah will surely prolong his length of days, until they see what they were threatened with, either the punishment or the hour; then they shall know who is in more evil plight and weaker in forces
t.haleem: Say [Prophet], ‘The Lord of Mercy lengthens [the lives] of the misguided, until, when they are confronted with what they have been warned about- either the punishment [in this life] or the Hour [of Judgement]- they realize who is worse situated and who has the weakest forces.’
t.maariful: Say, “Whoever stays straying, let his term be extended by the All-Merciful (Allah) still longer, until when they will see what they are being warned of: either the punishment or the Hour (of Doom), then they will know who was worse in his place and weaker in his forces
t.khattab: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “Whoever is ˹entrenched˺ in misguidance, the Most Compassionate will allow them plenty of time, until—behold!—they face what they are threatened with: either the torment or the Hour. Only then will they realize who is worse in position and inferior in manpower.”
t.ghali: Say, "Whoever has been in errancy, then indeed The All-Merciful will grant him an extension of days (Literally: extend for him an extension "of days") until, when they see what they were promised, whether the torment or the Hour, then they will soon know who is in an eviler place and weaker in hosts
t.irving: SAY: "May the Mercy-giving extend an opportunity to anyone who has been in error so that when they see what they are threatened with, whether it is torment or even the Hour, they will know who is in a worse plight and has the weakest following
t.iwq: Say, "Whoever is in error - let the Ever-Merciful extend for him an extension in wealth and time until, when they see that which they were promised - either punishment in this world or the Hour of resurrection - they will come to know who is worst in position and weaker in soldiers

t_id.kemenag: Katakanlah: "Barang siapa yang berada di dalam kesesatan, maka biarlah Tuhan yang Maha Pemurah memperpanjang tempo baginya; sehingga apabila mereka telah melihat apa yang diancamkan kepadanya, baik siksa maupun kiamat, maka mereka akan mengetahui siapa yang lebih jelek kedudukannya dan lebih lemah penolong-penolongnya".
t_id.sabiq: Wahai Rasul, katakanlah kepada mereka, "Barangsiapa berada dalam kesesatan dan kekufuran, maka Allah akan menangguhkan dan memanjangkan umurnya sehingga ia bertambah zalim dan sesat." orang-orang kafir itu akan selalu mengatakan kepada orang-orang yang beriman, "Di antara dua golongan, Mukmin dan kafir, siapakah yang lebih baik kedudukan dan tempat pertemuannya?" Hingga ketika mereka menyaksikan apa yang dijanjikan kepada mereka--adakalanya dalam bentuk penyiksaan orang-orang muslim di dunia terhadap mereka dengan pembunuhan dan penawanan, atau dalam keadaaan terhina di akhirat--saat itulah mereka baru menyadari bahwa merekalah yang lebih buruk kedudukannya dan lebih lemah penolong-penolongnya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah! "Barang siapa yang berada di dalam kesesatan) kalimat ayat ini mengandung syarat sedangkan Jawabnya ialah (maka biarlah diperpanjang) kalimat perintah di sini bermakna kalimat berita, artinya hendaknya diperpanjang (tempo baginya oleh Yang Maha Pemurah dengan sesungguhnya) di dunia ini dengan memperturutkan apa yang ia kehendaki (sehingga apabila mereka telah melihat apa yang diancamkan kepadanya, baik siksa) seperti dibunuh dan ditahan (maupun kiamat) yang pengertiannya mencakup juga neraka Jahanam tempat mereka dimasukkan ke dalamnya (maka mereka akan mengetahui siapa yang lebih jelek kedudukannya dan lebih lemah penolong-penolongnya") yakni pembantu-pembantunya; apakah mereka ataukah orang-orang yang beriman, pembantu-pembantu mereka adalah setan sedangkan pembantu-pembantu orang-orang yang beriman di dalam menghadapi mereka adalah para Malaikat.
t_id.iwq: Katakanlah: "Barang siapa yang berada di dalam kesesatan, maka biarlah Tuhan yang Maha Pemurah memperpanjang tempo baginya; sehingga apabila mereka telah melihat apa yang diancamkan kepadanya, baik siksa maupun kiamat, maka mereka akan mengetahui siapa yang lebih jelek kedudukannya dan lebih lemah penolong-penolongnya".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قل من كان في الضلالة» شرط جوابه «فليمدد» بمعنى الخبر أي يمد «له الرحمن مدا» في الدنيا يستدرجه «حتى إذا رأوا ما يوعدون إما العذاب» كالقتل والأسر «وإما الساعة» المشتملة على جهنم فيدخلونها «فسيعلمون من هو شر مكانا وأضعف جندا» أعوانا أهم أم المؤمنون وجندهم الشياطين وجند المؤمنين عليهم الملائكة
tafsir.siraj-ar: قُلۡ مَن كَانَ فِي ٱلضَّلَٰلَةِ فَلۡيَمۡدُدۡ لَهُ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ مَدًّاۚ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا رَأَوۡاْ مَا يُوعَدُونَ إِمَّا ٱلۡعَذَابَ وَإِمَّا ٱلسَّاعَةَ فَسَيَعۡلَمُونَ مَنۡ هُوَ شَرّٞ مَّكَانٗا وَأَضۡعَفُ جُندٗا (فَلْيَمْدُدْ: فَلْيُمْهِلْهُ، وَلْيُمْلِ لَهُ؛ اسْتِدْرَاجًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah! "Barang siapa yang berada di dalam kesesatan) kalimat ayat ini mengandung syarat sedangkan Jawabnya ialah (maka biarlah diperpanjang) kalimat perintah di sini bermakna kalimat berita, artinya hendaknya diperpanjang (tempo baginya oleh Yang Maha Pemurah dengan sesungguhnya) di dunia ini dengan memperturutkan apa yang ia kehendaki (sehingga apabila mereka telah melihat apa yang diancamkan kepadanya, baik siksa) seperti dibunuh dan ditahan (maupun kiamat) yang pengertiannya mencakup juga neraka Jahanam tempat mereka dimasukkan ke dalamnya (maka mereka akan mengetahui siapa yang lebih jelek kedudukannya dan lebih lemah penolong-penolongnya") yakni pembantu-pembantunya; apakah mereka ataukah orang-orang yang beriman, pembantu-pembantu mereka adalah setan sedangkan pembantu-pembantu orang-orang yang beriman di dalam menghadapi mereka adalah para Malaikat

ar: وَیَزِیدُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِینَ ٱهۡتَدَوۡا۟ هُدࣰىۗ وَٱلۡبَـٰقِیَـٰتُ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتُ خَیۡرٌ عِندَ رَبِّكَ ثَوَابࣰا وَخَیۡرࣱ مَّرَدًّا
ar_simple: وَيَزِيدُ اللَّهُ الَّذِينَ اهْتَدَوْا هُدًى ۗ وَالْبَاقِيَاتُ الصَّالِحَاتُ خَيْرٌ عِنْدَ رَبِّكَ ثَوَابًا وَخَيْرٌ مَرَدًّا
transliteration: wayazīdu l-lahu alladhīna ih'tadaw hudan wal-bāqiyātu l-ṣāliḥātu khayrun ʿinda rabbika thawāban wakhayrun maraddan

t.sahih-int: And Allah increases those who were guided, in guidance, and the enduring good deeds are better to your Lord for reward and better for recourse
t.asad: And God endows those who avail themselves of [His] guidance with an ever-deeper consciousness of the right way; and good deeds, the fruit whereof endures forever, are, in thy Sustainer's sight, of far greater merit [than any worldly goods], and yield far better returns
t.yusuf-ali: And Allah doth advance in guidance those who seek guidance: and the things that endure, Good Deeds, are best in the sight of thy Lord, as rewards, and best in respect of (their) eventual return
t.pickthall: Allah increaseth in right guidance those who walk aright, and the good deeds which endure are better in thy Lord's sight for reward, and better for resort
t.arberry: And God shall increase those who were guided in guidance; and the abiding things, the deeds of righteousness, are better with thy Lord in reward, and better in return
t.hilali-khan: And Allah increases in guidance those who walk aright [true believers in the Oneness of Allah who fear Allah much (abstain from all kinds of sins and evil deeds which He has forbidden), and love Allah much (perform all kinds of good deeds which He has ordained)]. And the righteous good deeds that last, are better with your Lord, for reward and better for resort
t.itani: God increases in guidance those who accept guidance. And the things that endure—the righteous deeds—have the best reward with your Lord, and the best outcome.
t.mubarakpuri: And Allah increases in guidance those who walk aright. And the righteous good deeds that last are better with your Lord for reward and better for resort.
t.qarib: To those rightly guided, God increases guidance, and the good deeds that will last are those that are deemed best and most rewarding in your Lord's sight
t.wahiduddin: God increases His guidance to those who follow guidance; and lasting good works are better in the sight of your Lord and are most rewarding
t.shakir: And Allah increases in guidance those who go aright; and ever-abiding good works are with your Lord best in recompense and best in yielding fruit
t.haleem: But God gives more guidance to those who are guided, and good deeds of lasting merit are best and most rewarding in your Lord’s sight
t.maariful: Allah makes those on the right path excel in guidance. And the everlasting virtues are better with your Lord in respect of reward and better in their return
t.khattab: And Allah increases in guidance those who are ˹rightly˺ guided. And the everlasting good deeds are far better with your Lord in reward and in outcome
t.ghali: And Allah increases the ones who have been guided in guidance. And the enduring things, the deeds of righteousness, are more charitable from the Providence of your Lord in requital and more charitable for turning back
t.irving: God increases guidance for those who have consented to be guided while honorable deeds that endure are best with your Lord as recompense and yield the best returns
t.iwq: And Allah increases those who were guided, in guidance, and the enduring good deeds are better to your Lord for reward and better for recourse

t_id.kemenag: Dan Allah akan menambah petunjuk kepada mereka yang telah mendapat petunjuk. Dan amal-amal saleh yang kekal itu lebih baik pahalanya di sisi Tuhanmu dan lebih baik kesudahannya.
t_id.sabiq: Adapun orang-orang yang beriman terhadap ayat-ayat Allah, ketika mendengar ayat-ayat itu mereka langsung menerimanya. Dengan begitu, Allah menambahkan petunjuk-Nya kepada mereka untuk berbuat baik. Amalan-amalan saleh itu lebih baik dan lebih kekal pahalanya di sisi Allah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Allah akan menambah kepada mereka yang telah mendapat petunjuk) berkat iman mereka (hidayah) berkat ayat-ayat yang diturunkan kepada mereka (Dan amal-amal saleh yang kekal itu) yaitu ketaatan kepada Allah yang selalu dilakukan oleh seseorang (lebih baik pahalanya di sisi Rabbmu dan lebih baik kesudahannya) akhir dan kesudahan daripadanya, berbeda dengan amal perbuatan orang-orang kafir. Pengertian perbandingan kebaikan di sini sebagai kebalikan daripada perkataan orang-orang kafir, yaitu ketika mereka mengatakan, "Manakah di antara kedua golongan yang lebih baik kedudukannya?"
t_id.iwq: Dan Allah akan menambah petunjuk kepada mereka yang telah mendapat petunjuk. Dan amal-amal saleh yang kekal itu lebih baik pahalanya di sisi Tuhanmu dan lebih baik kesudahannya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ويزيد الله الذين اهتدوا» بالإيمان «هدى» يما ينزل عليهم من الآيات «والباقيات الصالحات» هي الطاعة تبقى لصاحبها «خير عند ربك ثوابا وخير مردّا» أي ما يرد إليه ويرجع بخلاف أعمال الكفار والخيرية منا في مقابلة قولهم أي الفرقين خير مقاما
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَيَزِيدُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱهۡتَدَوۡاْ هُدٗىۗ وَٱلۡبَٰقِيَٰتُ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتُ خَيۡرٌ عِندَ رَبِّكَ ثَوَابٗا وَخَيۡرٞ مَّرَدًّا (وَالْبَاقِيَاتُ: الأَعْمَالُ الصَّالِحَاتُ, مَّرَدًّا: مَرْجِعًا، وَعَاقِبَةً)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan Allah akan menambah kepada mereka yang telah mendapat petunjuk) berkat iman mereka (hidayah) berkat ayat-ayat yang diturunkan kepada mereka (Dan amal-amal saleh yang kekal itu) yaitu ketaatan kepada Allah yang selalu dilakukan oleh seseorang (lebih baik pahalanya di sisi Rabbmu dan lebih baik kesudahannya) akhir dan kesudahan daripadanya, berbeda dengan amal perbuatan orang-orang kafir. Pengertian perbandingan kebaikan di sini sebagai kebalikan daripada perkataan orang-orang kafir, yaitu ketika mereka mengatakan, "Manakah di antara kedua golongan yang lebih baik kedudukannya

ar: أَفَرَءَیۡتَ ٱلَّذِی كَفَرَ بِءَایَـٰتِنَا وَقَالَ لَأُوتَیَنَّ مَالࣰا وَوَلَدًا
ar_simple: أَفَرَأَيْتَ الَّذِي كَفَرَ بِآيَاتِنَا وَقَالَ لَأُوتَيَنَّ مَالًا وَوَلَدًا
transliteration: afara-ayta alladhī kafara biāyātinā waqāla laūtayanna mālan wawaladan

t.sahih-int: Then, have you seen he who disbelieved in Our verses and said, "I will surely be given wealth and children [in the next life]
t.asad: And hast thou ever considered [the kind of man] who is bent on denying the truth of Our messages and says, "I will surely be given wealth and children
t.yusuf-ali: Hast thou then seen the (sort of) man who rejects Our Signs, yet says: "I shall certainly be given wealth and children
t.pickthall: Hast thou seen him who disbelieveth in Our revelations and saith: Assuredly I shall be given wealth and children
t.arberry: Hast thou seen him who disbelieves in Our signs and says, 'Assuredly I shall be given wealth and children
t.hilali-khan: Have you seen him who disbelieved in Our Ayat (this Quran and Muhammad SAW) and (yet) says: "I shall certainly be given wealth and children [if I will be alive (again]
t.itani: Have you seen him who denied Our revelations, and said, “I will be given wealth and children”?
t.mubarakpuri: Have you seen him who disbelieved in Our Ayat and said: "I shall certainly be given wealth and children [if I live again]."
t.qarib: Have you considered the man who denies the truth of Our signs and says, "I will surely be given wealth and children
t.wahiduddin: Have you seen him who denies the truth in Our revelations and says, "I shall certainly be given wealth and children
t.shakir: Have you, then, seen him who disbelieves in Our communications and says: I shall certainly be given wealth and children
t.haleem: Have you considered the man who rejects Our revelation, who says, ‘I will certainly be given wealth and children’
t.maariful: Have you, then, seen him who rejected Our verses and said, “I shall certainly be given wealth and children”
t.khattab: Have you seen ˹O Prophet˺ the one who rejects Our revelations yet boasts, “I will definitely be granted ˹plenty of˺ wealth and children ˹if there is an afterlife˺.”
t.ghali: So, have you seen (him) who has disbelieved in Our signs and said, "Indeed I will definitely be brought wealth and children
t.irving: Have you seen someone who disowns Our signs and says: "I shall still be given wealth and children
t.iwq: Then, have you seen he who disbelieved in Our verses and said, "I will surely be given wealth and children in the next life

t_id.kemenag: Maka apakah kamu telah melihat orang yang kafir kepada ayat-ayat Kami dan ia mengatakan: "Pasti aku akan diberi harta dan anak".
t_id.sabiq: Hendaknya kamu merasa heran, wahai Muhammad, terhadap orang kafir yang mengingkari ayat-ayat Allah dan tertipu oleh kehidupan dunia, sehingga mengingkari hari kebangkitan dan, dengan nada mengolok-olok, berkata, "Sesungguhnya di akhirat yang kalian yakini keberadaannya, Allah akan memberikan kepadaku harta dan anak yang dapat aku banggakan di sana." Ia mengira bahwa akhirat itu seperti dunia. Ia lupa bahwa akhirat merupakan tempat pembalasan bagi kebaikan dan kejahatan. Sesungguhnya kemuliaan di akhirat hanya dapat diperoleh dengan amal saleh.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka apakah kamu telah melihat orang yang kafir kepada ayat-ayat Kami) maksudnya 'Ashi bin Wa'il (dan ia mengatakan,) kepada Khabbab bin Art yang mengatakan kepadanya, bahwa engkau kelak akan dibangkitkan hidup kembali sesudah mati. Pada saat itu Khabbab sedang menagih utang kepadanya ("Pasti aku akan diberi) seandainya aku dibangkitkan hidup kembali (harta dan anak") maka pada saat itu aku akan membayar utangku kepadamu. Allah berfirman menyanggahnya:
t_id.iwq: Maka apakah kamu telah melihat orang yang kafir kepada ayat-ayat Kami dan ia mengatakan: "Pasti aku akan diberi harta dan anak".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أفرأيت الذي كفر بآياتنا» العاص بن وائل «وقال» لخباب بن الأرث القائل له نبعث بعد الموت والمطالب له بمال «لأوتينَّ» على تقدير البعث «مالاً وولدا» فأقضيك، قال تعالى
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَفَرَءَيۡتَ ٱلَّذِي كَفَرَ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا وَقَالَ لَأُوتَيَنَّ مَالٗا وَوَلَدًا (أَفَرَأَيْتَ: أَعَلِمْتَ؟)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka apakah kamu telah melihat orang yang kafir kepada ayat-ayat Kami) maksudnya 'Ashi bin Wa'il (dan ia mengatakan,) kepada Khabbab bin Art yang mengatakan kepadanya, bahwa engkau kelak akan dibangkitkan hidup kembali sesudah mati. Pada saat itu Khabbab sedang menagih utang kepadanya ("Pasti aku akan diberi) seandainya aku dibangkitkan hidup kembali (harta dan anak") maka pada saat itu aku akan membayar utangku kepadamu. Allah berfirman menyanggahnya

ar: أَطَّلَعَ ٱلۡغَیۡبَ أَمِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحۡمَـٰنِ عَهۡدࣰا
ar_simple: أَطَّلَعَ الْغَيْبَ أَمِ اتَّخَذَ عِنْدَ الرَّحْمَٰنِ عَهْدًا
transliteration: aṭṭalaʿa l-ghayba ami ittakhadha ʿinda l-raḥmāni ʿahdan

t.sahih-int: Has he looked into the unseen, or has he taken from the Most Merciful a promise
t.asad: Has he, perchance, attained to a realm which is beyond the reach of a created being's perception? or has he concluded a covenant with the Most Gracious
t.yusuf-ali: Has he penetrated to the Unseen, or has he taken a contract with (Allah) Most Gracious
t.pickthall: Hath he perused the Unseen, or hath he made a pact with the Beneficent
t.arberry: What, has he observed the Unseen, or taken a covenant with the All-merciful
t.hilali-khan: Has he known the unseen or has he taken a covenant from the Most Beneficent (Allah)
t.itani: Did he look into the future, or did he receive a promise from the Most Merciful?
t.mubarakpuri: Has he known the Unseen or has he taken a covenant from the Most Gracious
t.qarib: Has he received extrasensory knowledge, or has he received a pledge from the Merciful
t.wahiduddin: Has he looked to the unseen, or has he made a pledge to the Merciful One
t.shakir: Has he gained knowledge of the unseen, or made a covenant with the Beneficent Allah
t.haleem: Has he penetrated the unknown or received a pledge to that effect from the Lord of Mercy
t.maariful: Has he peeped into the Unseen or taken a covenant with the All-Merciful (Allah)
t.khattab: Has he looked into the unseen or taken a pledge from the Most Compassionate
t.ghali: Has he viewed the Unseen or taken to himself a covenant from the Providence of The All-Merciful
t.irving: Has he probed the Unseen or made a pled with the Mercy-giving
t.iwq: Has he looked into the unseen, or has he taken from the Ever-Merciful a promise

t_id.kemenag: Adakah ia melihat yang ghaib atau ia telah membuat perjanjian di sisi Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah?,
t_id.sabiq: Apakah orang kafir itu dapat melihat yang gaib, sehingga ia memberi kabar dengan benar; atau, ia telah membuat perjanjian dengan Allah, sehingga sangat berpengharapan?
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Adakah dia melihat yang gaib) apakah dia mengetahuinya sehingga ia berani mengatakan, bahwa dia akan diberi seperti apa yang dikatakannya itu. Lafal Aththala'a ini disebabkan sudah cukup hanya dengan memakai Hamzah Istifham, maka Hamzah Washalnya dibuang (atau ia telah membuat perjanjian di sisi Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah?) sehingga ia berani mengatakan, bahwa Allah akan memberikan kepadanya apa yang telah dikatakannya itu.
t_id.iwq: Adakah ia melihat yang ghaib atau ia telah membuat perjanjian di sisi Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah?,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أطلع الغيب» أي أعلمه وأن يؤتى ما قاله واستغنى بهمزة الاستفهام عن همزة الوصل فحذفت «أم اتخذ عند الرحمن عهدا» بأن يؤتى ما قاله
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَطَّلَعَ ٱلۡغَيۡبَ أَمِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ عَهۡدٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Adakah dia melihat yang gaib) apakah dia mengetahuinya sehingga ia berani mengatakan, bahwa dia akan diberi seperti apa yang dikatakannya itu. Lafal Aththala'a ini disebabkan sudah cukup hanya dengan memakai Hamzah Istifham, maka Hamzah Washalnya dibuang (atau ia telah membuat perjanjian di sisi Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah?) sehingga ia berani mengatakan, bahwa Allah akan memberikan kepadanya apa yang telah dikatakannya itu

ar: كَلَّاۚ سَنَكۡتُبُ مَا یَقُولُ وَنَمُدُّ لَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلۡعَذَابِ مَدࣰّا
ar_simple: كَلَّا ۚ سَنَكْتُبُ مَا يَقُولُ وَنَمُدُّ لَهُ مِنَ الْعَذَابِ مَدًّا
transliteration: kallā sanaktubu mā yaqūlu wanamuddu lahu mina l-ʿadhābi maddan

t.sahih-int: No! We will record what he says and extend for him from the punishment extensively
t.asad: Nay! We shall record what he says, and We shall lengthen the length of his suffering [in the hereafter]
t.yusuf-ali: Nay! We shall record what he says, and We shall add and add to his punishment
t.pickthall: Nay, but We shall record that which he saith and prolong for him a span of torment
t.arberry: No, indeed! We shall assuredly write down all that he says, and We shall prolong for him the chastisement
t.hilali-khan: Nay! We shall record what he says, and We shall increase his torment (in the Hell)
t.itani: No indeed! We will write what he says, and will keep extending the agony for him.
t.mubarakpuri: Nay, We shall record what he says, and We shall increase his torment;
t.qarib: No! We will record what he says and extend the duration of his punishment
t.wahiduddin: Indeed not. We shall record what he says and shall prolong the punishment for him
t.shakir: By no means! We write down what he says, and We will lengthen to him the length of the chastisement
t.haleem: No! We shall certainly record what he says and prolong his punishment
t.maariful: Never! We will write what he says and extend for him the punishment extensively
t.khattab: Not at all! We certainly record whatever he claims and will increase his punishment extensively
t.ghali: Not at all! We will soon write down whatever he says, and We will grant him an extension (Literally: extend him an extension) of torment
t.irving: Not at all! We shall write down anything he says and extend a chance of torment to him
t.iwq: No! We will record what he says and extend for him from the punishment extensively

t_id.kemenag: sekali-kali tidak, Kami akan menulis apa yang ia katakan, dan benar-benar Kami akan memperpanjang azab untuknya,
t_id.sabiq: Hendaknya ia menyudahi kebohongan yang dibuatnya. Sebab Kami akan memperhitungkan kebohongannya itu. Siksa yang akan menimpanya diperpanjang sampai batas yang tak dapat diperkirakan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sekali-kali tidak) hal itu tidak akan diberikan kepadanya (Kami akan menulis) Kami memerintahkan untuk menuliskan (apa yang ia katakan itu dan benar-benar Kami akan memperpanjang azab baginya) Kami akan menambahkan kepada azab kekafirannya azab yang lain, karena perkataannya itu.
t_id.iwq: sekali-kali tidak, Kami akan menulis apa yang ia katakan, dan benar-benar Kami akan memperpanjang azab untuknya,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «كلا» أي لا يؤتى ذلك «سنكتب» نأمر بكتب «ما يقول ونمدّ له العذاب مدا» نزيده بذلك عذابا فوق عذاب كفره
tafsir.siraj-ar: كَلَّاۚ سَنَكۡتُبُ مَا يَقُولُ وَنَمُدُّ لَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلۡعَذَابِ مَدّٗا (وَنَمُدُّ لَهُ: نَزِيدُ لَهُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sekali-kali tidak) hal itu tidak akan diberikan kepadanya (Kami akan menulis) Kami memerintahkan untuk menuliskan (apa yang ia katakan itu dan benar-benar Kami akan memperpanjang azab baginya) Kami akan menambahkan kepada azab kekafirannya azab yang lain, karena perkataannya itu

ar: وَنَرِثُهُۥ مَا یَقُولُ وَیَأۡتِینَا فَرۡدࣰا
ar_simple: وَنَرِثُهُ مَا يَقُولُ وَيَأْتِينَا فَرْدًا
transliteration: wanarithuhu mā yaqūlu wayatīnā fardan

t.sahih-int: And We will inherit him [in] what he mentions, and he will come to Us alone
t.asad: and divest him of all that he is [now] speaking of: for [on Judgment Day] he will appear before Us in a lonely state
t.yusuf-ali: To Us shall return all that he talks of and he shall appear before Us bare and alone
t.pickthall: And We shall inherit from him that whereof he spake, and he will come unto Us, alone (without his wealth and children)
t.arberry: and We shall inherit from him that he says, and he shall come to Us alone
t.hilali-khan: And We shall inherit from him (at his death) all that he talks of (i.e. wealth and children which We have bestowed upon him in this world), and he shall come to Us alone
t.itani: Then We will inherit from him what he speaks of, and he will come to Us alone.
t.mubarakpuri: And We shall inherit from him all that he speaks of, and he shall come to Us alone.
t.qarib: And We will inherit from him the things he's talks about, and he will come to Us alone
t.wahiduddin: We shall inherit all that he boasts of, and he will come to Us all alone
t.shakir: And We will inherit of him what he says, and he shall come to Us alone
t.haleem: We shall inherit from him all that he speaks of and he will come to Us all alone
t.maariful: And We will inherit from him what he is talking about, and he will come to Us all alone
t.khattab: And We will inherit what he boasts of, and he will come before Us all by himself
t.ghali: And We will inherit from him whatever he says, and he will come up to Us a single (person)
t.irving: We will inherit anything he says, and he will come to Us as an individual
t.iwq: And We will inherit him in what he mentions, and he will come to Us alone

t_id.kemenag: dan Kami akan mewarisi apa yang ia katakan itu, dan ia akan datang kepada Kami dengan seorang diri.
t_id.sabiq: Harta dan anak yang mereka banggakan saat di dunia akan dirampas dan dibinasakan. Kelak di akhirat, ia akan datang seorang diri: tanpa harta, anak dan penolong.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami akan mewarisi apa yang ia katakan itu) yaitu harta benda dan anak (dan ia akan datang kepada Kami) kelak pada hari kiamat (dengan seorang diri) dalam keadaan tidak punya harta benda dan tidak punya anak.
t_id.iwq: dan Kami akan mewarisi apa yang ia katakan itu, dan ia akan datang kepada Kami dengan seorang diri.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ونرثه ما يقول» من المال والولد «ويأتينا» يوم القيامة «فردا» لا مال له ولا ولد
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَنَرِثُهُۥ مَا يَقُولُ وَيَأۡتِينَا فَرۡدٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami akan mewarisi apa yang ia katakan itu) yaitu harta benda dan anak (dan ia akan datang kepada Kami) kelak pada hari kiamat (dengan seorang diri) dalam keadaan tidak punya harta benda dan tidak punya anak

ar: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةࣰ لِّیَكُونُوا۟ لَهُمۡ عِزࣰّا
ar_simple: وَاتَّخَذُوا مِنْ دُونِ اللَّهِ آلِهَةً لِيَكُونُوا لَهُمْ عِزًّا
transliteration: wa-ittakhadhū min dūni l-lahi ālihatan liyakūnū lahum ʿizzan

t.sahih-int: And they have taken besides Allah [false] deities that they would be for them [a source of] honor
t.asad: For [such as] these have taken to worshipping deities other than God, hoping that they would be a [source of] strength for them
t.yusuf-ali: And they have taken (for worship) gods other than Allah, to give them power and glory
t.pickthall: And they have chosen (other) gods beside Allah that they may be a power for them
t.arberry: And they have taken to them other gods apart from God, that they might be for them a might
t.hilali-khan: And they have taken (for worship) aliha (gods) besides Allah, that they might give them honour, power and glory (and also protect them from Allah's Punishment etc)
t.itani: And they took, besides God, other gods, to be for them a source of strength.
t.mubarakpuri: And they have taken gods besides Allah, that they might give them honor, power and glory.
t.qarib: And they have taken gods other than God, hoping that they would be [a source of] strength for them
t.wahiduddin: They have taken other deities besides God, so that they may be a source of strength for them
t.shakir: And they have taken gods besides Allah, that they should be to them a source of strength
t.haleem: They have taken other gods beside God to give them strength
t.maariful: They have taken gods other than Allah, so that they may be a source of might for them
t.khattab: They have taken other gods, instead of Allah, seeking strength ˹and protection˺ through them
t.ghali: And they have taken to themselves (other) gods apart from Allah, that they would be for them a might (i.e. that gods would make mighty)
t.irving: They have adopted other deities instead of God, so they will mean [more] influence for them
t.iwq: And they have taken besides Allah false deities that they would be for them a source of honor

t_id.kemenag: Dan mereka telah mengambil sembahan-sembahan selain Allah, agar sembahan-sembahan itu menjadi pelindung bagi mereka,
t_id.sabiq: Orang-orang kafir itu telah menjadikan banyak tuhan selain Allah untuk disembah, dengan harapan tuhan-tuhan itu dapat memberi syafaat kepada mereka di akhirat kelak.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka telah mengambil) orang-orang kafir Mekah (selain dari Allah) yakni berhala-berhala (sebagai tuhan-tuhan) yang mereka sembah (agar tuhan-tuhan itu menjadi pelindung bagi mereka) maksudnya memberikan syafaat kepada mereka di hadapan Allah supaya mereka jangan diazab oleh-Nya.
t_id.iwq: Dan mereka telah mengambil sembahan-sembahan selain Allah, agar sembahan-sembahan itu menjadi pelindung bagi mereka,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «واتخذوا» أي كفار مكة «من دون الله» الأوثان «آلهة» يعبدونهم «ليكونوا لهم عزا» شفعاء عند الله بألا يعذبوا
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱتَّخَذُواْ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةٗ لِّيَكُونُواْ لَهُمۡ عِزّٗا (عِزًّا: شُفَعَاءَ، وَأَنْصَارًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka telah mengambil) orang-orang kafir Mekah (selain dari Allah) yakni berhala-berhala (sebagai tuhan-tuhan) yang mereka sembah (agar tuhan-tuhan itu menjadi pelindung bagi mereka) maksudnya memberikan syafaat kepada mereka di hadapan Allah supaya mereka jangan diazab oleh-Nya

ar: كَلَّاۚ سَیَكۡفُرُونَ بِعِبَادَتِهِمۡ وَیَكُونُونَ عَلَیۡهِمۡ ضِدًّا
ar_simple: كَلَّا ۚ سَيَكْفُرُونَ بِعِبَادَتِهِمْ وَيَكُونُونَ عَلَيْهِمْ ضِدًّا
transliteration: kallā sayakfurūna biʿibādatihim wayakūnūna ʿalayhim ḍiddan

t.sahih-int: No! Those "gods" will deny their worship of them and will be against them opponents [on the Day of Judgement]
t.asad: But nay! [On Judgment Day] these [very objects of adoration] will disavow the worship that was paid to them, and will turn against those [who had worshipped them]
t.yusuf-ali: Instead, they shall reject their worship, and become adversaries against them
t.pickthall: Nay, but they will deny their worship of them, and become opponents unto them
t.arberry: No, indeed! They shall deny their service, and they shall be against them pitted
t.hilali-khan: Nay, but they (the so-called gods) will deny their worship of them, and become opponents to them (on the Day of Resurrection)
t.itani: By no means! They will reject their worship of them, and become opponents to them.
t.mubarakpuri: Nay, but they will deny their worship of them, and will become their adversaries.
t.qarib: No! Those deities will reject their worship and will even turn against them
t.wahiduddin: But they shall reject their worship and turn against them
t.shakir: By no means! They shall soon deny their worshipping them, and they shall be adversaries to them
t.haleem: but these gods will reject their worship and will even turn against them
t.maariful: Never! They (their fabricated deities) will soon reject their having worshipped them, and they will be just the opposite for them
t.khattab: But no! Those ˹gods˺ will deny their worship and turn against them
t.ghali: Not at all! They will soon disbelieve in their worship of them and will be opponents against them
t.irving: Not at all! The [false gods] will reject their own worship and pit themselves against them
t.iwq: No! Those "gods" will deny their worship of them and will be against them opponents on the Day of Judgement

t_id.kemenag: sekali-kali tidak. Kelak mereka (sembahan-sembahan) itu akan mengingkari penyembahan (pengikut-pengikutnya) terhadapnya, dan mereka (sembahan-sembahan) itu akan menjadi musuh bagi mereka.
t_id.sabiq: Hendaknya mereka menghindari prasangka seperti itu. Sebab, tuhan-tuhan itu kelak akan mengingkari penyembahan terhadap diri mereka. Mereka justru akan menjadi musuh orang-orang musyrik yang menuntut agar mereka disiksa.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sekali-kali tidak) tiada sesuatu pun yang dapat mencegah azab mereka. (Kelak mereka itu akan mengingkari) yakni tuhan-tuhan sembahan mereka itu (penyembahan mereka) artinya mereka akan mengingkari penyembahan orang-orang yang mempertuhankan mereka, sebagaimana dijelaskan pula oleh ayat lain, yaitu firman-Nya, "Mereka sekali-kali tidak menyembah Kami..." (Q.S. Al-Qashash, 63). (dan tuhan-tuhan itu akan menjadi musuh bagi mereka) yakni berhala-berhala itu justru akan menjadi musuh orang-orang yang menyembahnya kelak di akhirat.
t_id.iwq: sekali-kali tidak. Kelak mereka (sembahan-sembahan) itu akan mengingkari penyembahan (pengikut-pengikutnya) terhadapnya, dan mereka (sembahan-sembahan) itu akan menjadi musuh bagi mereka.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: (كلا) أي لا مانع من عذابهم (سيكفرون) أي الآلهة (بعبادتهم) أي ينفونها كما في آية أخرى "" ما كانوا إيانا يعبدون "" (ويكونون عليهم ضدا) أعوانا وأعداء
tafsir.siraj-ar: كَلَّاۚ سَيَكۡفُرُونَ بِعِبَادَتِهِمۡ وَيَكُونُونَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ ضِدًّا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sekali-kali tidak) tiada sesuatu pun yang dapat mencegah azab mereka. (Kelak mereka itu akan mengingkari) yakni tuhan-tuhan sembahan mereka itu (penyembahan mereka) artinya mereka akan mengingkari penyembahan orang-orang yang mempertuhankan mereka, sebagaimana dijelaskan pula oleh ayat lain, yaitu firman-Nya, "Mereka sekali-kali tidak menyembah Kami..." (Q.S. Al-Qashash, 63). (dan tuhan-tuhan itu akan menjadi musuh bagi mereka) yakni berhala-berhala itu justru akan menjadi musuh orang-orang yang menyembahnya kelak di akhirat

ar: أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّاۤ أَرۡسَلۡنَا ٱلشَّیَـٰطِینَ عَلَى ٱلۡكَـٰفِرِینَ تَؤُزُّهُمۡ أَزࣰّا
ar_simple: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّا أَرْسَلْنَا الشَّيَاطِينَ عَلَى الْكَافِرِينَ تَؤُزُّهُمْ أَزًّا
transliteration: alam tara annā arsalnā l-shayāṭīna ʿalā l-kāfirīna ta-uzzuhum azzan

t.sahih-int: Do you not see that We have sent the devils upon the disbelievers, inciting them to [evil] with [constant] incitement
t.asad: ART THOU NOT aware that We have let loose all [manner of] satanic forces upon those who deny the truth - [forces] that impel them [towards sin] with strong impulsion
t.yusuf-ali: Seest thou not that We have set the Evil Ones on against the unbelievers, to incite them with fury
t.pickthall: Seest thou not that We have set the devils on the disbelievers to confound them with confusion
t.arberry: Hast thou not seen how We sent the Satans against the unbelievers, to prick them
t.hilali-khan: See you not that We have sent the Shayatin (devils) against the disbelievers to push them to do evil
t.itani: Have you not considered how We dispatch the devils against the disbelievers, exciting them with incitement?
t.mubarakpuri: See you not that We have sent the Shayatin against the disbelievers to push them to do evil.
t.qarib: Do you not see that We have sent the devils to the unbelievers, inciting them to sin
t.wahiduddin: Do you not see that We have appointed devils to incite those who deny the truth to disobedience
t.shakir: Do you not see that We have sent the Shaitans against the unbelievers, inciting them by incitement
t.haleem: Have you [Prophet] not seen how We send devils to incite the disbelievers to sin
t.maariful: Have you not seen that We have sent the devils onto the disbelievers inciting them with all their incitements
t.khattab: Do you ˹O Prophet˺ not see that We have sent the devils against the disbelievers, constantly inciting them
t.ghali: Have you not seen that We sent Ash-Shayatin (The ever-vicious ones, i.e., the devils) against the disbelievers, alluring them by (every manner of) allurement
t.irving: Have you not seen how We send devils to disbelievers, to provoke them to fury
t.iwq: Do you not see that We have sent the devils upon the disbelievers, inciting them to evil with constant incitement

t_id.kemenag: Tidakkah kamu lihat, bahwasanya Kami telah mengirim syaitan-syaitan itu kepada orang-orang kafir untuk menghasung mereka berbuat maksiat dengan sungguh-sungguh?,
t_id.sabiq: Tidakkah kamu mengetahui, wahai Rasul, sesungguhnya Kami telah menguatkan pengaruh setan terhadap orang-orang kafir sehingga ia dapat menguasai dan mendorong mereka untuk menentang kebenaran. Mereka pun tunduk mengikuti setan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Tidakkah kamu lihat, bahwasanya Kami telah mengirim setan-setan itu) yakni pengaruh mereka (kepada orang-orang kafir untuk menghasut mereka) untuk menggerakkan mereka melakukan perbuatan-perbuatan maksiat (dengan sungguh-sungguh).
t_id.iwq: Tidakkah kamu lihat, bahwasanya Kami telah mengirim syaitan-syaitan itu kepada orang-orang kafir untuk menghasung mereka berbuat maksiat dengan sungguh-sungguh?,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ألم تر أنا أرسلنا الشياطين» سلطانهم «على الكافرين تؤزهم» تهيجهم إلى المعاصي «أزّا»
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا ٱلشَّيَٰطِينَ عَلَى ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ تَؤُزُّهُمۡ أَزّٗا (تَؤُزُّهُمْ أَزًّا: تَدْفَعُهُمْ عَنِ الطَّاعَةِ، وَتُغْرِيهِمْ بِالمَعْصِيَةِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Tidakkah kamu lihat, bahwasanya Kami telah mengirim setan-setan itu) yakni pengaruh mereka (kepada orang-orang kafir untuk menghasut mereka) untuk menggerakkan mereka melakukan perbuatan-perbuatan maksiat (dengan sungguh-sungguh)

ar: فَلَا تَعۡجَلۡ عَلَیۡهِمۡۖ إِنَّمَا نَعُدُّ لَهُمۡ عَدࣰّا
ar_simple: فَلَا تَعْجَلْ عَلَيْهِمْ ۖ إِنَّمَا نَعُدُّ لَهُمْ عَدًّا
transliteration: falā taʿjal ʿalayhim innamā naʿuddu lahum ʿaddan

t.sahih-int: So be not impatient over them. We only count out to them a [limited] number
t.asad: Hence, be not in haste [to call down God's punishment] upon them: for We but number the number of their days
t.yusuf-ali: So make no haste against them, for We but count out to them a (limited) number (of days)
t.pickthall: So make no haste against them (O Muhammad). We do but number unto them a sum (of days)
t.arberry: So hasten thou not against them; We are only numbering for them a number
t.hilali-khan: So make no haste against them; We only count out to them a (limited) number (of the days of the life of this world and delay their term so that they may increase in evil and sins)
t.itani: So do not hurry against them. We are counting for them a countdown.
t.mubarakpuri: So make no haste against them; We only count out to them a (limited) number.
t.qarib: So do not try to expedite their punishment. We are simply counting down the number of their days
t.wahiduddin: So take no hasty action against them; their days are numbered
t.shakir: Therefore be not in haste against them, We only number out to them a number (of days)
t.haleem: There is no need for you to be impatient concerning them: We are counting down their [allotted] time
t.maariful: So make no hurry about them; We are but counting for them a count down
t.khattab: So do not be in haste against them, for indeed We are ˹closely˺ counting down their days
t.ghali: So do not hasten against them; surely We are only numbering for them a number (of days)
t.irving: So do not act hasty towards them; We are only counting out so much [time] for them
t.iwq: So be not impatient over them. We only count out to them a limited number

t_id.kemenag: maka janganlah kamu tergesa-gesa memintakan siksa terhadap mereka, karena sesungguhnya Kami hanya menghitung datangnya (hari siksaan) untuk mereka dengan perhitungan yang teliti.
t_id.sabiq: Wahai Rasul, janganlah kekufuran mereka membuat hatimu susah. Dan jangan pula tergesa-gesa memintakan siksa untuk mereka. Sesungguhnya mereka dibiarkan di dunia sampai batas waktu tertentu, dan akan dihitung amal perbuatan dan dosa-dosa mereka untuk dihisab di akhirat kelak.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka janganlah kamu tergesa-gesa terhadap mereka) untuk mendatangkan azab buat mereka (karena sesungguhnya Kami hanya menghitung untuk mereka) hari-hari atau nafas-nafas mereka (dengan perhitungan yang teliti) hingga tiba saatnya azab mereka.
t_id.iwq: maka janganlah kamu tergesa-gesa memintakan siksa terhadap mereka, karena sesungguhnya Kami hanya menghitung datangnya (hari siksaan) untuk mereka dengan perhitungan yang teliti.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فلا تعجل عليهم» بطلب العذاب «إنما نعد لهم» الأيام والليالي أو الأنفاس «عدا» إلى وقت عذابهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَلَا تَعۡجَلۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡۖ إِنَّمَا نَعُدُّ لَهُمۡ عَدّٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka janganlah kamu tergesa-gesa terhadap mereka) untuk mendatangkan azab buat mereka (karena sesungguhnya Kami hanya menghitung untuk mereka) hari-hari atau nafas-nafas mereka (dengan perhitungan yang teliti) hingga tiba saatnya azab mereka

ar: یَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُ ٱلۡمُتَّقِینَ إِلَى ٱلرَّحۡمَـٰنِ وَفۡدࣰا
ar_simple: يَوْمَ نَحْشُرُ الْمُتَّقِينَ إِلَى الرَّحْمَٰنِ وَفْدًا
transliteration: yawma naḥshuru l-mutaqīna ilā l-raḥmāni wafdan

t.sahih-int: On the Day We will gather the righteous to the Most Merciful as a delegation
t.asad: On the Day when We shall gather the Godconscious unto [Us,] the Most Gracious, as honoured guests
t.yusuf-ali: The day We shall gather the righteous to (Allah) Most Gracious, like a band presented before a king for honours
t.pickthall: On the day when We shall gather the righteous unto the Beneficent, a goodly company
t.arberry: On the day that We shall muster the godfearing to the All-merciful with pomp
t.hilali-khan: The Day We shall gather the Muttaqun (pious - see V. 2:2) unto the Most Beneficent (Allah), like a delegate (presented before a king for honour)
t.itani: On the Day when We will gather the righteous to the Most Merciful, as guests.
t.mubarakpuri: The Day We shall gather those with Taqwa unto the Most Gracious (Allah), like a delegation.
t.qarib: On the Day [of Judgment,] We will gather all the righteous as [an honored] delegation to the Merciful
t.wahiduddin: The Day will surely come when We shall gather the God-fearing like [honoured] guests before the Compassionate God
t.shakir: The day on which We will gather those who guard (against evil) to the Beneficent Allah to receive honors
t.haleem: On the Day We gather the righteous as an honoured company before the Lord of Mercy
t.maariful: The day We will assemble the God-fearing before the All-Merciful (Allah) as guests
t.khattab: ˹Watch for˺ the Day We will gather the righteous before the Most Compassionate as an honoured delegation
t.ghali: On the Day We will muster the pious to The All-Merciful as a (welcome) deputation
t.irving: Some day We shall summon the heedful in a delegation before the Mercy-giving
t.iwq: On the Day We will gather the righteous to the Ever-Merciful as a delegation

t_id.kemenag: (Ingatlah) hari (ketika) Kami mengumpulkan orang-orang yang takwa kepada Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah sebagai perutusan yang terhormat,
t_id.sabiq: Wahai Rasul, ingatlah pada suatu hari Kami akan mengumpulkan orang-orang yang bertakwa di dalam surga Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah sebagai utusan dan kelompok yang terhormat.
t_id.jalalayn-id: Ingatlah (hari ketika Kami mengumpulkan orang-orang yang takwa) berkat keimanan mereka (kepada Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah sebagai perutusan yang terhormat). Lafal Wafdun adalah bentuk jamak dan lafal Waafidun, artinya delegasi.
t_id.iwq: (Ingatlah) hari (ketika) Kami mengumpulkan orang-orang yang takwa kepada Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah sebagai perutusan yang terhormat,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: اذكر «يوم نحشر المتقين» بإيمانهم «إلى الرحمن وفدا» جمع وافد بمعنى: راكب
tafsir.siraj-ar: يَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُ ٱلۡمُتَّقِينَ إِلَى ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ وَفۡدٗا (نَحْشُرُ: نَجْمَعُ, وَفْدًا: وُفُودًا مُكْرَمِينَ عَلَى الرِّكَابِ وَالرَّوَاحِلِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: Ingatlah (hari ketika Kami mengumpulkan orang-orang yang takwa) berkat keimanan mereka (kepada Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah sebagai perutusan yang terhormat). Lafal Wafdun adalah bentuk jamak dan lafal Waafidun, artinya delegasi

ar: وَنَسُوقُ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِینَ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ وِرۡدࣰا
ar_simple: وَنَسُوقُ الْمُجْرِمِينَ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ وِرْدًا
transliteration: wanasūqu l-muj'rimīna ilā jahannama wir'dan

t.sahih-int: And will drive the criminals to Hell in thirst
t.asad: and drive those who were lost in sin unto hell as a thirsty herd is driven to a well –
t.yusuf-ali: And We shall drive the sinners to Hell, like thirsty cattle driven down to water
t.pickthall: And drive the guilty unto hell, a weary herd
t.arberry: and drive the evildoers into Gehenna herding
t.hilali-khan: And We shall drive the Mujrimun (polytheists, sinners, criminals, disbelievers in the Oneness of Allah, etc.) to Hell, in a thirsty state (like a thirsty herd driven down to water)
t.itani: And herd the sinners into hell, like animals to water.
t.mubarakpuri: And We shall drive the criminals to Hell, in a thirsty state.
t.qarib: and will drive those who forced others to reject Our messages to Hell like a thirsty herd
t.wahiduddin: and We shall drive the sinful like a thirsty herd into Hell
t.shakir: And We will drive the guilty to hell thirsty
t.haleem: and drive the sinful like a thirsty herd into Hell
t.maariful: and will drive the sinners towards the Jahannam as herds of cattle (are driven) towards water
t.khattab: and drive the wicked to Hell like a thirsty herd
t.ghali: And drive the criminals into Hell, (a thirsty) herd
t.irving: and drive criminals in a drove towards Hell
t.iwq: And will drive the criminals to Hell in thirst

t_id.kemenag: dan Kami akan menghalau orang-orang yang durhaka ke neraka Jahannam dalam keadaan dahaga.
t_id.sabiq: Sementara orang-orang yang durhaka dihalau menuju ke neraka jahanam dalam keadaan dahaga, layaknya seperti binatang yang kehausan saat dihalau menuju air.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami akan menghalau orang-orang yang durhaka) karena kekafiran mereka (ke neraka Jahanam dalam keadaan dahaga). Lafal Wirdun adalah bentuk jamak dari lafal Waaridun artinya berjalan dalam keadaan dahaga.
t_id.iwq: dan Kami akan menghalau orang-orang yang durhaka ke neraka neraka dalam keadaan dahaga.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ونسوق المجرمين» بكفرهم «إلى جهنم وردا» جمع وارد بمعنى ماش عطشان
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَنَسُوقُ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمِينَ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ وِرۡدٗا (وِرْدًا: مُشِاةً عِطَاشًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan Kami akan menghalau orang-orang yang durhaka) karena kekafiran mereka (ke neraka Jahanam dalam keadaan dahaga). Lafal Wirdun adalah bentuk jamak dari lafal Waaridun artinya berjalan dalam keadaan dahaga

ar: لَّا یَمۡلِكُونَ ٱلشَّفَـٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحۡمَـٰنِ عَهۡدࣰا
ar_simple: لَا يَمْلِكُونَ الشَّفَاعَةَ إِلَّا مَنِ اتَّخَذَ عِنْدَ الرَّحْمَٰنِ عَهْدًا
transliteration: lā yamlikūna l-shafāʿata illā mani ittakhadha ʿinda l-raḥmāni ʿahdan

t.sahih-int: None will have [power of] intercession except he who had taken from the Most Merciful a covenant
t.asad: [on that Day] none will have [the benefit of] intercession unless he has [in his lifetime] entered into a bond with the Most Gracious
t.yusuf-ali: None shall have the power of intercession, but such a one as has received permission (or promise) from (Allah) Most Gracious
t.pickthall: They will have no power of intercession, save him who hath made a covenant with his Lord
t.arberry: having no power of intercession, save those who have taken with the All-merciful covenant
t.hilali-khan: None shall have the power of intercession, but such a one as has received permission (or promise) from the Most Beneficent (Allah)
t.itani: They will have no power of intercession, except for someone who has an agreement with the Most Merciful.
t.mubarakpuri: None shall have the power of intercession, but such a one as has received permission (or promise) from the Most Gracious (Allah).
t.qarib: None will have [power to] intercede on their behalf except him who has received permission from the Merciful
t.wahiduddin: No one will have power to intercede, except for those who have permission from the Lord of Mercy
t.shakir: They shall not control intercession, save he who has made a covenant with the Beneficent Allah
t.haleem: no one will have power to intercede except for those who have permission from the Lord of Mercy
t.maariful: none will have power to intercede, except the one who has entered into a covenant with the All-Merciful (Allah)
t.khattab: None will have the right to intercede, except those who have taken a covenant from the Most Compassionate
t.ghali: They do not possess (any means of) intercession, except the ones who have taken to him from the Providence of the All-Merciful a covenant
t.irving: They will possess no power of intercession except for someone who has already accepted a pledge from the Mercy-giving
t.iwq: None will have power of intercession except he who had taken from the Ever-Merciful a covenant

t_id.kemenag: Mereka tidak berhak mendapat syafa'at kecuali orang yang telah mengadakan perjanjian di sisi Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah.
t_id.sabiq: Pada hari itu, tak seorang pun yang mendapat syafaat, kecuali orang yang mendapat izin dari Allah karena adanya suatu perjanjian.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka tidak dapat memberi) manusia semuanya (syafaat kecuali orang yang telah mengadakan perjanjian di sisi Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah) yakni kesaksian bahwa tiada Tuhan selain Allah dan tiada daya serta tiada kekuatan melainkan berkat pertolongan Allah.
t_id.iwq: Mereka tidak berhak mendapat syafa'at kecuali orang yang telah mengadakan perjanjian di sisi Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «لا يملكون» أي الناس «الشفاعة إلا من اتخذ عند الرحمن عهدا» أي شهادة أن لا إله إلا الله ولا حول ولا قوة إلا بالله
tafsir.siraj-ar: لَّا يَمۡلِكُونَ ٱلشَّفَٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ عَهۡدٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka tidak dapat memberi) manusia semuanya (syafaat kecuali orang yang telah mengadakan perjanjian di sisi Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah) yakni kesaksian bahwa tiada Tuhan selain Allah dan tiada daya serta tiada kekuatan melainkan berkat pertolongan Allah

ar: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱلرَّحۡمَـٰنُ وَلَدࣰا
ar_simple: وَقَالُوا اتَّخَذَ الرَّحْمَٰنُ وَلَدًا
transliteration: waqālū ittakhadha l-raḥmānu waladan

t.sahih-int: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken [for Himself] a son
t.asad: As it is, some assert, "The Most Gracious has taken unto Himself a son
t.yusuf-ali: They say: "(Allah) Most Gracious has begotten a son
t.pickthall: And they say: The Beneficent hath taken unto Himself a son
t.arberry: And they say, 'The All-merciful has taken unto Himself a son
t.hilali-khan: And they say: "The Most Beneficent (Allah) has begotten a son (or offspring or children) [as the Jews say: 'Uzair (Ezra) is the son of Allah, and the Christians say that He has begotten a son ['Iesa (Christ)], and the pagan Arabs say that He has begotten daughters (angels, etc)
t.itani: And they say, “The Most Merciful has begotten a son.”
t.mubarakpuri: And they say: "The Most Gracious (Allah) has begotten a son."
t.qarib: And they say, "The Merciful-to-all has taken [for Himself] a son
t.wahiduddin: They say, "The Gracious One has begotten a son
t.shakir: And they say: The Beneficent Allah has taken (to Himself) a son
t.haleem: The disbelievers say, ‘The Lord of Mercy has offspring.’
t.maariful: They say, “The All-Merciful (Allah) has got a son.”
t.khattab: They say, “The Most Compassionate has offspring.”
t.ghali: And they have said, "The All-Merciful has taken to Him a child
t.irving: They say: "The Mercy-giving has adopted a son
t.iwq: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken for Himself a son

t_id.kemenag: Dan mereka berkata: "Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah mengambil (mempunyai) anak".
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya orang-orang musyrik, Yahudi dan Nasrani telah benar-benar mengatakan, "Sesungguhnya Allah mempunyai anak berupa malaikat atau manusia."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka berkata,) orang-orang Yahudi dan Nasrani dan orang-orang yang menyangka bahwa malaikat-malaikat itu adalah anak-anak perempuan Allah ("Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah mempunyai anak") maka Allah menyanggah perkataan mereka itu melalui firman-Nya,
t_id.iwq: Dan mereka berkata: "Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah mengambil (mempunyai) anak".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وقالوا» أي اليهود والنصارى ومن زعم أن الملائكة بنات الله «اتخذ الرحمن ولدا» قال تعالى لهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَقَالُواْ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ وَلَدٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan mereka berkata,) orang-orang Yahudi dan Nasrani dan orang-orang yang menyangka bahwa malaikat-malaikat itu adalah anak-anak perempuan Allah ("Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah mempunyai anak") maka Allah menyanggah perkataan mereka itu melalui firman-Nya

ar: لَّقَدۡ جِئۡتُمۡ شَیۡءًا إِدࣰّا
ar_simple: لَقَدْ جِئْتُمْ شَيْئًا إِدًّا
transliteration: laqad ji'tum shayan iddan

t.sahih-int: You have done an atrocious thing
t.asad: Indeed, [by this assertion] you have brought forth something monstrous
t.yusuf-ali: Indeed ye have put forth a thing most monstrous
t.pickthall: Assuredly ye utter a disastrous thing
t.arberry: You have indeed advanced something hideous
t.hilali-khan: Indeed you have brought forth (said) a terrible evil thing
t.itani: You have come up with something monstrous.
t.mubarakpuri: Indeed you have brought forth (said) a thing Idda.
t.qarib: You have done an atrocious thing
t.wahiduddin: Assuredly, you have uttered a monstrous falsehood
t.shakir: Certainly you have made an abominable assertion
t.haleem: How terrible is this thing you assert
t.maariful: Indeed you have come up with such an abominable statement
t.khattab: You have certainly made an outrageous claim
t.ghali: Indeed you have already come with a hideous thing
t.irving: You have brought up something monstrous
t.iwq: You have done an atrocious thing

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya kamu telah mendatangkan sesuatu perkara yang sangat mungkar,
t_id.sabiq: Wahai orang-orang yang mengatakan demikian, dengan berkata seperti itu, sesungguhnya kalian telah mendatangkan sesuatu yang tidak dapat diterima oleh akal sehat.
t_id.jalalayn-id: ("Sesungguhnya kalian telah mendatangkan sesuatu perkara yang sangat mungkar) yaitu suatu perkara mungkar yang sangat besar.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya kamu telah mendatangkan sesuatu perkara yang sangat mungkar,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «لقد جئتم شيئا إدا» أي منكرا عظيما
tafsir.siraj-ar: لَّقَدۡ جِئۡتُمۡ شَيۡـًٔا إِدّٗا (إِدًّا: شَيْئًا عَظِيمًا مُنْكَرًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya kalian telah mendatangkan sesuatu perkara yang sangat mungkar) yaitu suatu perkara mungkar yang sangat besar

ar: تَكَادُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَ ٰتُ یَتَفَطَّرۡنَ مِنۡهُ وَتَنشَقُّ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَتَخِرُّ ٱلۡجِبَالُ هَدًّا
ar_simple: تَكَادُ السَّمَاوَاتُ يَتَفَطَّرْنَ مِنْهُ وَتَنْشَقُّ الْأَرْضُ وَتَخِرُّ الْجِبَالُ هَدًّا
transliteration: takādu l-samāwātu yatafaṭṭarna min'hu watanshaqqu l-arḍu watakhirru l-jibālu haddan

t.sahih-int: The heavens almost rupture therefrom and the earth splits open and the mountains collapse in devastation
t.asad: whereat the heavens might well-nigh be rent into fragments, and the earth be split asunder, and the mountains fall down in ruins
t.yusuf-ali: At it the skies are ready to burst, the earth to split asunder, and the mountains to fall down in utter ruin
t.pickthall: Whereby almost the heavens are torn, and the earth is split asunder and the mountains fall in ruins
t.arberry: The heavens are wellnigh rent of it and the earth split asunder, and the mountains wellnigh fall down crashing for
t.hilali-khan: Whereby the heavens are almost torn, and the earth is split asunder, and the mountains fall in ruins
t.itani: At which the heavens almost rupture, and the earth splits, and the mountains fall and crumble.
t.mubarakpuri: Whereby the heavens are almost torn, and the earth is split asunder, and the mountains Hadda.
t.qarib: It almost causes the heavens to rupture, the earth to split open and the mountains to collapse in devastation
t.wahiduddin: the heavens might well-nigh burst thereat, and the earth break asunder, and the mountains fall down in pieces
t.shakir: The heavens may almost be rent thereat, and the earth cleave asunder, and the mountains fall down in pieces
t.haleem: it almost causes the heavens to be torn apart, the earth to split asunder, the mountains to crumble to pieces
t.maariful: that the heavens are well-nigh to explode at it, and the earth to burst apart, and the mountains to fall down crumbling
t.khattab: by which the heavens are about to burst, the earth to split apart, and the mountains to crumble to pieces
t.ghali: The heavens are almost about to be rent asunder thereof, and the earth cloven and the mountains to collapse, razed (completely)
t.irving: Me heavens almost burst apart from it, while the earth splits open and the mountains fall down with a crash
t.iwq: The heavens almost rupture therefrom and the earth splits open and the mountains collapse in devastation

t_id.kemenag: hampir-hampir langit pecah karena ucapan itu, dan bumi belah, dan gunung-gunung runtuh,
t_id.sabiq: Hampir-hampir langit pecah karena ucapan itu, dan bumi terbelah serta gunung-gunung runtuh berkeping-keping.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Hampir-hampir) dapat dibaca Takaadu dan Yakaadu (langit pecah) terbelah, dan menurut qiraat yang lain lafal Yatafaththarna dibaca Yanfathirna (karena ucapan itu dan bumi belah dan gunung-gunung runtuh) yakni terbalik menindih mereka disebabkan.
t_id.iwq: hampir-hampir langit pecah karena ucapan itu, dan bumi belah, dan gunung-gunung runtuh,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «تكاد» بالتاء والياء «السماوات يتفطرن» بالتاء وتشديد الطاء بالانشقاق وفي قراءة بالنون «منه وتنشق الأرض وتخر الجبال هدّا» أي تنطبق عليهم من أجل
tafsir.siraj-ar: تَكَادُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ يَتَفَطَّرۡنَ مِنۡهُ وَتَنشَقُّ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَتَخِرُّ ٱلۡجِبَالُ هَدًّا (يَتَفَطَّرْنَ: يَتَشَقَّقْنَ, وَتَخِرُّ الْجِبَالُ هَدًّا: تَسْقُطُ سُقُوطًا شَدِيدًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Hampir-hampir) dapat dibaca Takaadu dan Yakaadu (langit pecah) terbelah, dan menurut qiraat yang lain lafal Yatafaththarna dibaca Yanfathirna (karena ucapan itu dan bumi belah dan gunung-gunung runtuh) yakni terbalik menindih mereka disebabkan

ar: أَن دَعَوۡا۟ لِلرَّحۡمَـٰنِ وَلَدࣰا
ar_simple: أَنْ دَعَوْا لِلرَّحْمَٰنِ وَلَدًا
transliteration: an daʿaw lilrraḥmāni waladan

t.sahih-int: That they attribute to the Most Merciful a son
t.asad: That men should ascribe a son to the Most Gracious
t.yusuf-ali: That they should invoke a son for (Allah) Most Gracious
t.pickthall: That ye ascribe unto the Beneficent a son
t.arberry: that they have attributed to the All-merciful a son
t.hilali-khan: That they ascribe a son (or offspring or children) to the Most Beneficent (Allah)
t.itani: Because they attribute a son to the Most Merciful.
t.mubarakpuri: That they ascribe a son to the Most Gracious.
t.qarib: that they attribute a son to the Merciful
t.wahiduddin: because they ascribe a son to the Gracious One
t.shakir: That they ascribe a son to the Beneficent Allah
t.haleem: that they attribute offspring to the Lord of Mercy
t.maariful: for they have ascribed a son to the All-Merciful (Allah)
t.khattab: in protest of attributing children to the Most Compassionate
t.ghali: For that they have attributed to The All-Merciful a child
t.irving: that anyone should ascribe a son to the Mercy-giving
t.iwq: That they attribute to the Ever-Merciful a son

t_id.kemenag: karena mereka mendakwakan Allah Yang Maha Pemurah mempunyai anak.
t_id.sabiq: Bencana di bumi, langit dan gunung hampir saja terjadi karena mereka menyatakan bahwa Allah mempunyai anak.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (mereka mendakwakan Allah Yang Maha Pemurah mempunyai anak"). Allah berfirman,
t_id.iwq: karena mereka mendakwakan Allah Yang Maha Pemurah mempunyai anak.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أن دعوا للرحمن ولدا» قال تعالى
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَن دَعَوۡاْ لِلرَّحۡمَٰنِ وَلَدٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (mereka mendakwakan Allah Yang Maha Pemurah mempunyai anak"). Allah berfirman

ar: وَمَا یَنۢبَغِی لِلرَّحۡمَـٰنِ أَن یَتَّخِذَ وَلَدًا
ar_simple: وَمَا يَنْبَغِي لِلرَّحْمَٰنِ أَنْ يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدًا
transliteration: wamā yanbaghī lilrraḥmāni an yattakhidha waladan

t.sahih-int: And it is not appropriate for the Most Merciful that He should take a son
t.asad: although it is inconceivable that the Most Gracious should take unto Himself a son
t.yusuf-ali: For it is not consonant with the majesty of (Allah) Most Gracious that He should beget a son
t.pickthall: When it is not meet for (the Majesty of) the Beneficent that He should choose a son
t.arberry: and it behoves not the All-merciful to take a son
t.hilali-khan: But it is not suitable for (the Majesty of) the Most Beneficent (Allah) that He should beget a son (or offspring or children)
t.itani: It is not fitting for the Most Merciful to have a son.
t.mubarakpuri: But it is not suitable for the Most Gracious that He should beget a son.
t.qarib: It does not befit the Merciful to take a son
t.wahiduddin: It does not become the majesty of the Compassionate God to take to Himself a son
t.shakir: And it is not worthy of the Beneficent Allah that He should take (to Himself) a son
t.haleem: It does not befit the Lord of Mercy [to have offspring]
t.maariful: while it does not behove the All-Merciful to have a son
t.khattab: It does not befit ˹the majesty of˺ the Most Compassionate to have children
t.ghali: And in no way does it behoove The All-Merciful to take to Him a child
t.irving: It is not proper for the Mercy-giving to adopt a son
t.iwq: And it is not appropriate for the Ever-Merciful that He should take a son

t_id.kemenag: Dan tidak layak bagi Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah mengambil (mempunyai) anak.
t_id.sabiq: Sangatlah tidak masuk akal jika Allah mempunyai anak. Sebab pernyataan seperti itu menunjukkan bahwa Allah itu baharu (hâdits) dan membutuhkan sesuatu.
t_id.jalalayn-id: ("Dan tidak layak bagi Allah Yang Maha Pemurah mempunyai anak") yakni tidak patut bagi-Nya hal yang demikian itu.
t_id.iwq: Dan tidak layak bagi Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah mengambil (mempunyai) anak.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وما ينبغي للرحمن أن يتخذ ولدا» أي ما يليق به ذلك
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَا يَنۢبَغِي لِلرَّحۡمَٰنِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدًا (وَمَا يَنبَغِي: مَا يَلِيقُ، وَمَا يَصْلُحُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan tidak layak bagi Allah Yang Maha Pemurah mempunyai anak") yakni tidak patut bagi-Nya hal yang demikian itu

ar: إِن كُلُّ مَن فِی ٱلسَّمَـٰوَ ٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ إِلَّاۤ ءَاتِی ٱلرَّحۡمَـٰنِ عَبۡدࣰا
ar_simple: إِنْ كُلُّ مَنْ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ إِلَّا آتِي الرَّحْمَٰنِ عَبْدًا
transliteration: in kullu man fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi illā ātī l-raḥmāni ʿabdan

t.sahih-int: There is no one in the heavens and earth but that he comes to the Most Merciful as a servant
t.asad: Not one of all [the beings] that are in the heavens or on earth appears before the Most Gracious other than as a servant
t.yusuf-ali: Not one of the beings in the heavens and the earth but must come to (Allah) Most Gracious as a servant
t.pickthall: There is none in the heavens and the earth but cometh unto the Beneficent as a slave
t.arberry: None is there in the heavens and earth but he comes to the All-merciful as a servant
t.hilali-khan: There is none in the heavens and the earth but comes unto the Most Beneficent (Allah) as a slave
t.itani: There is none in the heavens and the earth but will come to the Most Merciful as a servant.
t.mubarakpuri: There is none in the heavens and the earth but comes unto the Most Gracious as a slave.
t.qarib: There is no one in the heavens and earth who will not come as a servant to the Merciful
t.wahiduddin: there is none in the heavens or on the earth but shall return to the Merciful in utter submission
t.shakir: There is no one in the heavens and the earth but will come to the Beneficent Allah as a servant
t.haleem: there is no one in the heavens or earth who will not come to the Lord of Mercy as a servant
t.maariful: There is none in the heavens and the earth, but bound to come to the All-Merciful as a salve
t.khattab: There is none in the heavens or the earth who will not return to the Most Compassionate in full submission
t.ghali: Decidedly none is there (Literally: all that are there) in the heavens and the earth except that he comes up to The All-Merciful as a slave
t.irving: Everyone who is in Heaven and Earth comes to the Mercy-giving merely as a servant
t.iwq: There is no one in the heavens and earth but that he comes to the Ever-Merciful as a servant

t_id.kemenag: Tidak ada seorangpun di langit dan di bumi, kecuali akan datang kepada Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah selaku seorang hamba.
t_id.sabiq: Tidak ada seorang pun yang ada di langit dan bumi, melainkan akan datang kepada Allah pada hari kiamat sebagai seorang hamba yang tunduk kepada ketuhanan-Nya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Tidak ada) (seorang pun di langit dan di bumi melainkan akan datang kepada Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah selaku seorang hamba) yang hina dan tunduk patuh kepada-Nya kelak di hari kiamat, termasuk Uzair dan Isa juga.
t_id.iwq: Tidak ada seorangpun di langit dan di bumi, kecuali akan datang kepada Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah selaku seorang hamba.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن» أي ما «كل من في السماوات والأرض إلا آتي للرحمن عبداً» ذليلا خاضعا يوم القيامة منهم عزير وعيسى
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِن كُلُّ مَن فِي ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ إِلَّآ ءَاتِي ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ عَبۡدٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Tidak ada) (seorang pun di langit dan di bumi melainkan akan datang kepada Tuhan Yang Maha Pemurah selaku seorang hamba) yang hina dan tunduk patuh kepada-Nya kelak di hari kiamat, termasuk Uzair dan Isa juga

ar: لَّقَدۡ أَحۡصَىٰهُمۡ وَعَدَّهُمۡ عَدࣰّا
ar_simple: لَقَدْ أَحْصَاهُمْ وَعَدَّهُمْ عَدًّا
transliteration: laqad aḥṣāhum waʿaddahum ʿaddan

t.sahih-int: He has enumerated them and counted them a [full] counting
t.asad: indeed, He has full cognizance of them, and has numbered them with [unfailing] numbering
t.yusuf-ali: He does take an account of them (all), and hath numbered them (all) exactly
t.pickthall: Verily He knoweth them and numbereth them with (right) numbering
t.arberry: He has indeed counted them, and He has numbered them exactly
t.hilali-khan: Verily, He knows each one of them, and has counted them a full counting
t.itani: He has enumerated them, and counted them one by one.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, He knows each one of them, and has counted them a full counting.
t.qarib: He has numbered them and counted them precisely
t.wahiduddin: He has counted them and numbered them precisely
t.shakir: Certainly He has a comprehensive knowledge of them and He has numbered them a (comprehensive) numbering
t.haleem: He has counted them all: He has numbered them exactly
t.maariful: He has fully encompassed them and precisely calculated their numbers
t.khattab: Indeed, He fully knows them and has counted them precisely
t.ghali: Indeed He has already enumerated them, and He has numbered them with (exact) numbering
t.irving: He numbers them and counts them up
t.iwq: He has enumerated them and counted them a full counting

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya Allah telah menentukan jumlah mereka dan menghitung mereka dengan hitungan yang teliti.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya ilmu Allah itu meliputi mereka dan amal perbuatannya. Tak ada seorang pun dari mereka beserta amal perbuatannya yang tidak diketahui oleh Allah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Allah telah menentukan jumlah mereka dan menghitung mereka dengan hitungan yang teliti) maka tidak samar bagi-Nya mengenai jumlah mereka secara keseluruhan atau pun secara rinci dan tiada seorang pun yang terlewat dari perhitungan-Nya.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya Allah telah menentukan jumlah mereka dan menghitung mereka dengan hitungan yang teliti.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «لقد أحصاهم وعدهم عدا» فلا يخفى عليه مبلغ جميعهم ولا واحد منهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: لَّقَدۡ أَحۡصَىٰهُمۡ وَعَدَّهُمۡ عَدّٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya Allah telah menentukan jumlah mereka dan menghitung mereka dengan hitungan yang teliti) maka tidak samar bagi-Nya mengenai jumlah mereka secara keseluruhan atau pun secara rinci dan tiada seorang pun yang terlewat dari perhitungan-Nya

ar: وَكُلُّهُمۡ ءَاتِیهِ یَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِیَـٰمَةِ فَرۡدًا
ar_simple: وَكُلُّهُمْ آتِيهِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ فَرْدًا
transliteration: wakulluhum ātīhi yawma l-qiyāmati fardan

t.sahih-int: And all of them are coming to Him on the Day of Resurrection alone
t.asad: and every one of them will appear before Him on Resurrection Day in a lonely state
t.yusuf-ali: And everyone of them will come to Him singly on the Day of Judgment
t.pickthall: And each one of them will come unto Him on the Day of Resurrection, alone
t.arberry: Every one of them shall come to Him upon the Day of Resurrection, all alone
t.hilali-khan: And everyone of them will come to Him alone on the Day of Resurrection (without any helper, or protector or defender)
t.itani: And each one of them will come to Him on the Day of Resurrection alone.
t.mubarakpuri: And everyone of them will come to Him alone on the Day of Resurrection.
t.qarib: so that every one of them will appear alone before Him on the Day of Resurrection
t.wahiduddin: each one of them shall come to Him one by one on the Day of Judgement
t.shakir: And every one of them will come to Him on the day of resurrection alone
t.haleem: and they will each return to Him on the Day of Resurrection all alone
t.maariful: and each one of them is bound to come to Him on the Day of Judgment, all alone
t.khattab: And each of them will return to Him on the Day of Judgment all alone
t.ghali: And all of them will be coming up to Him upon the Day of the Resurrection, every one singly
t.irving: Each of them is coming to Him on Resurrection Day as an individual
t.iwq: And all of them are coming to Him on the Day of Rising alone

t_id.kemenag: Dan tiap-tiap mereka akan datang kepada Allah pada hari kiamat dengan sendiri-sendiri.
t_id.sabiq: Pada hari kiamat, mereka semua akan datang kepada Allah sendiri-sendiri, tanpa penolong, anak dan harta benda.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan tiap-tiap mereka akan datang kepada Allah pada hari kiamat dengan sendiri-sendiri) tanpa harta dan tanpa pembantu yang dapat membelanya.
t_id.iwq: Dan tiap-tiap mereka akan datang kepada Allah pada hari kiamat dengan sendiri-sendiri.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وكلهم آتيه يوم القيامة فردا» بلا مال ولا نصير يمنعه
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَكُلُّهُمۡ ءَاتِيهِ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ فَرۡدًا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan tiap-tiap mereka akan datang kepada Allah pada hari kiamat dengan sendiri-sendiri) tanpa harta dan tanpa pembantu yang dapat membelanya

ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِینَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ سَیَجۡعَلُ لَهُمُ ٱلرَّحۡمَـٰنُ وُدࣰّا
ar_simple: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ سَيَجْعَلُ لَهُمُ الرَّحْمَٰنُ وُدًّا
transliteration: inna alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti sayajʿalu lahumu l-raḥmānu wuddan

t.sahih-int: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - the Most Merciful will appoint for them affection
t.asad: VERILY, those who attain to faith and do righteous deeds will the Most Gracious endow with love
t.yusuf-ali: On those who believe and work deeds of righteousness, will (Allah) Most Gracious bestow love
t.pickthall: Lo! those who believe and do good works, the Beneficent will appoint for them love
t.arberry: Surely those who believe and do deeds of righteousness -- unto them the All-merciful shall assign love
t.hilali-khan: Verily, those who believe [in the Oneness of Allah and in His Messenger (Muhammad SAW)] and work deeds of righteousness, the Most Beneficent (Allah) will bestow love for them (in the hearts of the believers)
t.itani: Those who believe and do righteous deeds, the Most Merciful will give them love.
t.mubarakpuri: Verily, those who believe and work deeds of righteousness, the Most Gracious will bestow love for them.
t.qarib: The Merciful-to-all will bestow His affection on those who have believed and done righteous deeds
t.wahiduddin: The Lord of Mercy will bestow affection upon those who believe and perform righteous deeds
t.shakir: Surely (as for) those who believe and do good deeds for them will Allah bring about love
t.haleem: But the Lord of Mercy will give love to those who believe and do righteous deeds
t.maariful: Surely, those who believe and do righteous deeds, for them the All-Merciful (Allah) will create love
t.khattab: As for those who believe and do good, the Most Compassionate will ˹certainly˺ bless them with ˹genuine˺ love
t.ghali: Surely the ones who have believed and done deeds of righteousness, for them The All-Merciful will soon show (Literally: make for them) affection
t.irving: The Mercy-giving will grant affection to those who believe and perform honorable deeds
t.iwq: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - the Ever-Merciful will appoint for them affection

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang beriman dan beramal saleh, kelak Allah Yang Maha Pemurah akan menanamkan dalam (hati) mereka rasa kasih sayang.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya orang-orang Mukmin yang mengerjakan amal saleh, akan dicintai oleh Allah dan manusia.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang beriman dan beramal saleh, kelak Allah Yang Maha Pemurah akan menanamkan dalam hati mereka rasa kasih sayang) di antara sesama mereka; mereka saling kasih-mengasihi dan sayang-menyayangi dan Allah swt. mencintai mereka semuanya.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang beriman dan beramal saleh, kelak Allah Yang Maha Pemurah akan menanamkan dalam (hati) mereka rasa kasih sayang.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إن الذين آمنوا وعملوا الصالحات سيجعل لهم الرحمن وُدّا» فيما بينهم يتوادون ويتحابون ويحبهم الله تعالى
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَٰتِ سَيَجۡعَلُ لَهُمُ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ وُدّٗا (وُدًّا: مَحَبَّةً فِي قُلُوبِ عِبَادِهِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang beriman dan beramal saleh, kelak Allah Yang Maha Pemurah akan menanamkan dalam hati mereka rasa kasih sayang) di antara sesama mereka; mereka saling kasih-mengasihi dan sayang-menyayangi dan Allah swt. mencintai mereka semuanya

ar: فَإِنَّمَا یَسَّرۡنَـٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لِتُبَشِّرَ بِهِ ٱلۡمُتَّقِینَ وَتُنذِرَ بِهِۦ قَوۡمࣰا لُّدࣰّا
ar_simple: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنَاهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لِتُبَشِّرَ بِهِ الْمُتَّقِينَ وَتُنْذِرَ بِهِ قَوْمًا لُدًّا
transliteration: fa-innamā yassarnāhu bilisānika litubashira bihi l-mutaqīna watundhira bihi qawman luddan

t.sahih-int: So, [O Muhammad], We have only made Qur'an easy in the Arabic language that you may give good tidings thereby to the righteous and warn thereby a hostile people
t.asad: and only to this end have We made this [divine writ] easy to understand, in thine own tongue, [O Prophet,] so that thou might convey thereby a glad tiding to the God-conscious, and warn thereby those who are given to [futile] contention
t.yusuf-ali: So have We made the (Qur'an) easy in thine own tongue, that with it thou mayest give Glad Tidings to the righteous, and warnings to people given to contention
t.pickthall: And We make (this Scripture) easy in thy tongue, (O Muhammad) only that thou mayst bear good tidings therewith unto those who ward off (evil), and warn therewith the froward folk
t.arberry: Now We have made it easy by thy tongue that thou mayest bear good tidings thereby to the godfearing, and warn a people stubborn
t.hilali-khan: So We have made this (the Quran) easy in your own tongue (O Muhammad SAW), only that you may give glad tidings to the Muttaqun (pious and righteous persons - See V. 2:2), and warn with it the Ludda (most quarrelsome) people
t.itani: We made it easy in your tongue, in order to deliver good news to the righteous, and to warn with it a hostile people.
t.mubarakpuri: So, We have made this easy in your own tongue, only that you may give glad tidings to those who have Taqwa, and warn with it the people that are Ludda.
t.qarib: And We have made [this Qur'an] easy to recite [Prophet] so that you may give good news to the righteous and warning to stubborn people
t.wahiduddin: We have made it [the Quran] easy, in your own language [Prophet], so that you may convey glad news to the righteous and give warning to a stubborn people
t.shakir: So We have only made it easy in your tongue that you may give good news thereby to those who guard (against evil) and warn thereby a vehemently contentious people
t.haleem: We have made it easy, in your own language [Prophet], so that you may bring glad news to the righteous and warnings to a stubborn people
t.maariful: So We have made it (the Qur’ān) easy through your tongue, so that you give with it the good news to the God-fearing, and warn with it an obstinate people
t.khattab: Indeed, We have made this ˹Quran˺ easy in your own language ˹O Prophet˺ so with it you may give good news to the righteous and warn those who are contentious
t.ghali: So surely We have made it easy in your tongue only that you may bear good tidings thereby to the pious and warn thereby an obstinate people
t.irving: We have made it easy for your tongue so you may announce good news about it to those who do their duty, and warn headstrong folk by means of it
t.iwq: So, O Muhammad, We have only made Qur'an easy in the Arabic language that you may give good tidings thereby to the righteous and warn thereby a hostile people

t_id.kemenag: Maka sesungguhnya telah Kami mudahkan Al Quran itu dengan bahasamu, agar kamu dapat memberi kabar gembira dengan Al Quran itu kepada orang-orang yang bertakwa, dan agar kamu memberi peringatan dengannya kepada kaum yang membangkang.
t_id.sabiq: Kami telah memudahkan al-Qur'ân dengan bahasamu, agar kamu dapat memberi kabar gembira berupa perkenan dan nikmat Allah kepada orang yang mengikuti perintah-Nya dan menjauhi larangan-Nya. Juga, agar kamu memberi peringatan berupa murka Allah dan siksa-Nya kepada orang yang ingkar dan membangkang.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka sesungguhnya telah Kami mudahkan dia) Alquran itu (dengan bahasamu) bahasa Arab (agar kamu dapat memberi kabar gembira dengan Alquran itu kepada orang-orang yang bertakwa) yaitu orang-orang yang beruntung memperoleh iman (dan agar kamu memberi peringatan) menakut-nakuti (dengannya kepada kaum yang membangkang). Lafal Luddan adalah bentuk jamak dari lafal Aladdun artinya banyak membantah dengan kebatilan, mereka adalah orang-orang kafir Mekah.
